overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking through a neon-lit bar called 'Madame Sauvage's Place'. The character moves from the entrance area past patrons seated at the bar, then toward a back door leading to another room. The environment features industrial architecture with metal catwalks, green and yellow neon lighting, and a moody atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: main floor of cyberpunk bar with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the main floor toward the illuminated bar counter

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter preparing drinks

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'MADAME SAUVAGE'S PLACE' in yellow neon
futuristic circular light fixture hanging from the ceiling
metal railing on the second floor overlooking the main area
black metal fence railing along the walkway
curved bar counter with yellow neon underlighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the main floor of a cyberpunk bar, approaching a neon-lit counter. The space features industrial metal catwalks above, green and yellow neon lighting, and the prominent 'Madame Sauvage's Place' sign. A bartender is visible behind the counter as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar counter area with seated patrons

events.description: character begins turning slightly toward the back of the bar where a door is visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the bar counter, passing by patrons seated on stools

notable_agents.action: patrons sitting at the bar counter engaged in conversation

entered.detail: tall stools lined up along the bar counter
metal double doors at the back of the bar with a small light above

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the bar counter where several patrons are seated on stools. The 'Madame Sauvage's Place' sign is now on the left. Around the 20-second mark, the character turns slightly toward a metal door visible at the back of the bar, passing by booth seating on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor leading to utility room

events.description: automatic metal doors slide open revealing a brightly lit back room
character slows and enters the doorway

agents.ego_description: approaching the back door and entering the room beyond

entered.detail: wall with horizontal green neon light strips
automatic sliding doors opening to reveal the back room
utility room with blue lighting and industrial equipment visible through the door

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the back door of the bar, passing a wall with green neon stripes. At around 38 seconds, the automatic doors slide open to reveal a brightly lit industrial back room. The character then enters the doorway, transitioning from the main bar area to the back room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody, neon-lit cyberpunk bar that eventually opens into a brightly lit industrial back room. It begins on the main floor beneath metal catwalks, moving toward a counter illuminated by green and yellow neon and the Madame Sauvage's Place sign. As the camera glides along the bar, it passes seated patrons and booth seating before turning toward a metal door at the rear of the establishment. The scene then shifts past a wall of green neon stripes as the character approaches the exit, where automatic doors slide open to reveal a starkly lit interior. Finally, the camera crosses the threshold, transitioning from the atmospheric glow of the bar into the bright expanse of the back room.
